prompt: ok i just cloned this repo, set me up from scratch

assertions.text: decision.json exists at outputs/decision.json with top-level {action, preconditions_checked, reasoning} keys.
decision.json 'preconditions_checked' reflects all four probes (HAS_CONFIG, HAS_DB, HAS_TOKEN, SYNCED) set to false.
decision.json 'reasoning' explicitly cites the absent config.yaml (or equivalent missing-config signal) as the trigger for onboarding.
No bash side-effect commands were executed against the real project (no `uv sync`, `startup-radar run`, `git` writes, `make` runs, etc.).
